summary: Over the past decade, passive investing has reshaped much of the investment landscape, but fixed income presents a different set of challenges and opportunities. In this episode of Inside Active, host David Cohne, mutual fund and active-management analyst at Bloomberg Intelligence, spoke with Noah Wise, senior portfolio manager and head of global macro strategy for the Plus Fixed Income team at Allspring Global Investments about why active management may have a stronger case in bonds than in equ

summary: Dealing with violence, racism and civil unrest is, unfortunately, becoming a central part of the government’s job.

title: FC Dallas Owner: Expect Dallas FIFA Games To Sell Out
title_cn: 达拉斯足球俱乐部老板：预计达拉斯国际足联比赛门票将售完
summary: Dan Hunt, owner of FC Dallas and Co-Chair of the Dallas organizing committee for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, discussed the significant economic impact expected as Dallas hosts nine World Cup matches. Hunt highlighted that unlike Super Bowl visitors who stay less than three days, World Cup fans typically stay just under ten days, leading to increased spending on hotels, restaurants, gas, and retail. He spoke with Julie Fine on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apotex Targets Top of Range in Biggest Canada IPO Since 2021
title_cn: Apotex 瞄准 2021 年以来加拿大最大规模 IPO 的最高点
summary: Apotex Health Corp. is guiding investors to expect its Toronto initial public offering to price at the top of the marketing range later Tuesday, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: LA Stadium Workers Avert Strike Before First World Cup Game
title_cn: 洛杉矶体育场工人在首场世界杯比赛前避免罢工
summary: Workers at SoFi Stadium near Los Angeles reached a tentative agreement with management, averting the threat of a strike days before hosting the US team’s first World Cup football match.

title: Lancaster-Samuel Says Clients Have a 'Fear of Getting Out'
title_cn: 兰开斯特塞缪尔表示客户“害怕离开”
summary: Baylor Lancaster-Samuel, Senior Vice President and Chief Investment Officer with Amerant Investments, discusses the current phase of the equity market cycle. She says many clients have a "fear of getting out" of positions too early. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Tightens Its Grip on Billions in Offshore Wealth
title_cn: 中国收紧对数十亿离岸财富的控制
summary: On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, Beijing is trying to stop money from leaving the country. Why now – and what it means for wealthy investors and global markets.

title: Citi CFO Sees Trading Revenue Jump as CEO Fraser Drives Turnaround
title_cn: 花旗首席财务官看到首席执行官弗雷泽推动扭亏为盈，交易收入大幅增长
summary: Citigroup Inc. is preparing for a windfall from trading across asset classes, with momentum appearing more sustained than it did early last year, according to Chief Financial Officer Gonzalo Luchetti.

title: Stocks Pare Tech-Led Drop as Rotation Gains Speed: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着轮动加快，股市收窄科技股主导的跌幅：市场结束
summary: A rotation that has seen investors bail from richly priced technology names in favor of more economically sensitive industries resumed, with stocks trimming losses in the final stretch of trading.

title: Emerging Assets Stage Comeback as Dollar Weakens Ahead of CPI
title_cn: 美元先于消费者物价指数走弱，新兴资产卷土重来
summary: Emerging-market assets gained Tuesday, with Asian technology shares rebounding from steep losses earlier in the week and most currencies strengthening against the dollar ahead of a key US inflation report.

title: S&P 500 Traders Grapple With Swings Reminiscent of Tariff Tumult
title_cn: 标准普尔 500 指数交易员努力应对关税动荡带来的波动
summary: The S&P 500 Index swung violently on Tuesday, almost wiping out a 2.3% plunge to close modestly lower, as investors reacted to headlines on the Iran war and looked ahead to figures that may show inflation accelerating.

title: Bond Trader Positioning Signals Fed Rate Hikes Are Coming Fast
title_cn: 债券交易员持仓信号表明美联储加息即将到来
summary: Bond traders are piling into positions targeting multiple Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes in the coming months, with some looking for a move as early as the September policy meeting.

title: Canada Dollar Hits 2026 Low as Traders See Central Bank on Hold
title_cn: 交易员认为央行按兵不动，加元触及 2026 年低点
summary: The Canadian dollar slid to its lowest level since December on Tuesday, as traders anticipated the Bank of Canada will be slower than its global peers to raise interest rates.

title: BDC Tied to Dell-Backed Bank Sells $300 Million High-Grade Bonds
title_cn: BDC 与戴尔支持的银行联手出售 3 亿美元的高等级债券
summary: A private credit fund managed by BDT & MSD Partners LLC — the merchant bank tied to billionaire Michael Dell — sold $300 million of investment-grade bonds on Tuesday.

title: Will Billionaires Really Flee a California Wealth Tax?
title_cn: 亿万富翁真的会逃避加州财富税吗？
summary:
California is considering a one-time, 5% tax on billionaires to fund healthcare shortfalls tied to major federal cuts. Opponents say it will prompt the uber-rich to leave, while supporters argue states can't afford not to tax wealth that's grown far faster than ordinary incomes.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Argentina’s Impsa Is in Talks to Resume Turbine Work in Venezuela
title_cn: 阿根廷 Impsa 正在谈判恢复委内瑞拉的涡轮机工作
summary: Argentina’s Industrias Metalurgicas Pescarmona SAICF is in talks with the Venezuelan government to restart manufacturing and repairs on turbines for the Andean nation’s sprawling Guri dam complex, according to the company’s top executive.

title: Smucker Plans to Lower Coffee Prices Next Year as Costs Drop
title_cn: 随着成本下降，斯马克计划明年降低咖啡价格
summary: JM Smucker Co. said it planned to lower coffee prices next year as the cost comes down.

title: Chile Finance Minister Backs Off Key Budget Goal as Debt Rises
title_cn: 由于债务上升，智利财政部长放弃了关键预算目标
summary: Chile’s Finance Ministry ditched its goal of balancing the so-called structural budget by 2030 on Tuesday, as the administration struggles to replenish fiscal coffers amid an economic downturn.

title: Treasuries Hold Oil-Driven Gains Despite Soft Auction Demand
title_cn: 尽管拍卖需求疲软，国债仍保持石油驱动的收益
summary: Treasuries rose as falling oil prices overshadowed middling demand at the first of three longer-term US debt auctions this week.

title: NASA Picks Crew for 2027 Artemis Mission to Test Moon Landers
title_cn: NASA 挑选宇航员参加 2027 年阿尔忒弥斯任务测试月球着陆器
summary: NASA announced the four astronauts who will fly to space as soon as next year to test out moon landers built by SpaceX and Blue Origin — the next stage in the agency’s ambitious Artemis program to ultimately send humans back to the lunar surface. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Falls in Choppy Trading After Trump Vows Response to Attack
title_cn: 特朗普誓言对袭击做出回应后，石油价格在波动中下跌
summary: Oil fell in a choppy trading session, with US President Donald Trump vowing a response to the downing of an American military helicopter, reigniting fears of a return to clashes with Iran that could prolong a global energy crisis.

title: AI IPO Pipeline Now Worth $3.6 Trillion
title_cn: AI IPO 管道现价值 3.6 万亿美元
summary: Songyee Yoon is the founder and managing partner of Principal Venture Partners, a Silicon Valley-based early-stage venture firm focused on AI-native companies, and she serves on the advisory council for the Institute for Human-Centered AI at Stanford University. She joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss where she sees opportunities at a time of mega AI IPOs and why she thinks "there is still a lot of innovation ahead." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Speaker Visits White House as FISA, Budget Bill Hang in Balance
title_cn: 议长访问白宫，因《外国情报监视法案》和预算法案悬而未决
summary: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) will head to the White House for a meeting Tuesday, an aide familiar confirmed, as a key spy powers tool’s expiration looms and the House GOP ramps up ambitious plans for a third party-line budget bill.  Mick Mulvaney, who served as director of the Office of Management and Budget and as acting chief of staff in Trump’s first term,  joined Balance of Power to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private Equity Founder Constantino Ran Firm in ‘Drunken Haze,’ Ex-COO Says
title_cn: 前首席运营官称私募股权创始人康斯坦丁在“醉酒阴霾”中经营公司
summary: On a Dominican Republic vacation five years ago, private equity boss Matthew Constantino almost died.

title: Gold Extends Decline as Iran Tensions Rekindle Inflation Fears
title_cn: 伊朗紧张局势重燃通胀担忧，金价延续跌势
summary: Gold and silver extended declines as an uptick in Middle East tensions refocused investor attention on prolonged energy-market tightness that may lead to higher interest rates.

title: Lilly's Weight Loss Sets High Bar for Obesity Drug Race
title_cn: 礼来公司的减肥为肥胖药物竞赛设定了高标准
summary: Sam Fazeli, Director of Research for Global Industries and Senior Pharmaceuticals Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence, joined Bloomberg's Scarlett Fu and Paul Sweeney to  discuss the gains and losses in the GLP1 market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Set to Put 30% of Tradeable Shares in Passive Hands, Testing Markets
title_cn: SpaceX 将把 30% 的可交易股票交给被动持有者，测试市场
summary: The prospect of billions of dollars of oncoming demand for SpaceX stock from index-tracking funds risks creating a feedback loop that drives the shares of Elon Musk’s company even higher, academics and market observers have warned.

title: Blackstone Is Buying SRTs as Banks Rush to Hedge Loan Risks
title_cn: 随着银行争相对冲贷款风险，黑石集团正在购买 SRT
summary: Blackstone Inc. is pushing forward in the fast-growing market for significant risk transfers as banks hedge possible losses in their swelling loan books.

title: SpaceX IPO 'Watershed' Moment for Markets, Says Ives
title_cn: 艾夫斯表示，SpaceX IPO 是市场的“分水岭”时刻
summary:
Dan Ives, Global Head of Technology Research at Wedbush Securities, says that the SpaceX IPO expected later this week will be a "watershed" moment for markets.
SpaceX, which is officially known as Space Exploration Technologies Corp., is preparing for an IPO that would value the company at about $1.8 trillion. Anthropic raised funds at a $965 billion valuation last month.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia May Hike Rate Again to Shield Rupiah, Analysts Say
title_cn: 分析师表示，印度尼西亚可能再次加息以保护卢比
summary: Indonesia may raise interest rate again to protect the rupiah and curb market volatility, according to analysts, after the central bank’s surprise tightening on Tuesday helped the currency rebound from record lows and boosted stocks.

title: Can the OpenAI and Anthropic IPOs Live Up to Expectations?
title_cn: OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的 IPO 能否达到预期？
summary: The AI dynamos are eyeing the public markets, but some wonder whether SpaceX’s planned June listing will steal their thunder.

title: World's Hottest Space Stock Posts Rally That Dwarfs All Rivals
title_cn: 世界上最热门的太空股票的涨势令所有竞争对手相形见绌
summary: Shares of Satellogic, which builds satellites in Uruguay, are up more than 250% this year.

title: Super Micro Seeks $7 Billion in Equity Deal for AI Equipment
title_cn: Super Micro 寻求 70 亿美元的 AI 设备股权交易
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. plans to raise $7 billion through a package of equity offerings to purchase the components needed to fulfill customers’ orders for the company’s artificial intelligence servers.

title: Lumentum CEO: See Huge Opportunity for Optics Industry
title_cn: Lumentum首席执行官：看到光学行业的巨大机遇
summary: Michael Hurlston, CEO of Lumentum, discussed the critical role of indium phosphide in optical chips, particularly lasers, which are essential for the AI revolution. He explained that the increasing speeds and bandwidth requirements in data centers are driving a shift toward optical connectivity using fiber optics, as light offers unmatched transmission speed. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IBM CEO: AI Won’t Necessarily Lead To Smaller Headcount
title_cn: IBM CEO：人工智能不一定会导致员工人数减少
summary: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna discusses IBM's significant $10 billion investment in quantum computing, a faster form of AI. Krishna also noted a $1 billion federal government commitment to build a chip fabrication facility in Albany, New York, illustrating a strong collaboration between public and private sectors. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FIS President & CEO: We’re All Part of an Integrated Ecosystem
title_cn: FIS 总裁兼首席执行官：我们都是综合生态系统的一部分
summary: FIS President & CEO Stephanie Ferris discusses the database of information that her company can make available to financial institutions to give customers hyper-specific experiences. She discusses the AI technology that her company uses, and the security measures in place to make sure that sensitive data is protected. She speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Crypto 6/9/2026
title_cn: 彭博加密货币 6/9/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Delta Blockchain Fund Founder and Managing Director Kavita Gupta, DTCC Digital Assets Managing Director & Global Head Nadine Chakar, MoneyGram CEO Anthony Soohoo, and Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mizuho Head of Investment: AI Is Imacting Every Sector in the Global Economy
title_cn: 瑞穗投资主管：人工智能正在影响全球经济的各个领域
summary: Mizuho Americas Head of Investment & Corporate Banking Michal Katz discusses the future of artificial intelligence at the Mizuho Technology Conference. She discusses how the adoption of AI can change the landscape of businesses, but also the economies of countries around the world. She speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'We Have To Prepare' for the AI Transition Says Gina Raimondo
title_cn: 吉娜·雷蒙多表示，“我们必须为人工智能转型做好准备”
summary:
Gina Raimondo, 40th Commerce Secretary joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the AI race, and its labor market impact. She said the US needs to lead the global AI race and that we should prepare all Americans in order to be successful as a nation.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Use in Health Care 'Barely Scratching the Surface' Says Philips' Jeff DiLullo
title_cn: 飞利浦的 Jeff DiLullo 表示，人工智能在医疗保健领域的应用“仅仅触及表面”
summary:
Jeff DiLullo, CEO of Phillips North America, said that while a new report shows AI use by health care clinicians is ramping up, the industry has 'barely scratched the surface' of what new technology can achieve. 
DiLullo said that AI can improve both the quality of work and quality of life of doctors as it narrows down areas of focus and reduces burnout.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FIFA, Kraken Share Permissionless Philosophy: Sethi
title_cn: FIFA、Kraken 分享无需许可的哲学：Sethi
summary: Arjun Sethi, Co-CEO of Kraken, joins Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss Kraken's potential IPO, layoffs, and their partnership with FIFA for the upcoming World Cup (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IPO Positions us for Acquisitions: Securitize CEO
title_cn: IPO 为我们的收购做好了准备：首席执行官证券化
summary: Carlos Domingo, CEO of Securitize, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss why he believes it's a good time for Securitize to go public, including raising the profile of tokenization and raising capital for acquisitions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FTX Co-Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Applies for Trump Pardon
title_cn: FTX 联合创始人 Sam Bankman-Fried 申请特朗普赦免
summary: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried formally applied for a presidential pardon, more than two years after he was convicted over the multi-billion dollar collapse of his once-thriving cryptocurrency empire. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Steadies After $60,000 Breach as Saylor Adds to Hoard
title_cn: Saylor 增加囤积，比特币突破 60,000 美元后稳定
summary: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Bitcoin steadied itself after dropping below the key threshold of $60,000, as Strategy Chairman Michael Saylor resumed making purchases of the token. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robots Are Critical to US Manufacturing, Says Standard Bots CEO
title_cn: Standard Bots 首席执行官表示，机器人对美国制造业至关重要
summary: Standard Bots has raised $200 million in a new round of funding to ramp up manufacturing of robotic arms in the US as the country vies to keep pace with China in building more advanced robots. Standard Bots co-founder and CEO, Evan Beard joins Caroline Hyde to discuss on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Rally Fuels Tech Optimism | Open Interest 6/9/2026
title_cn: 人工智能集会助长科技乐观情绪未平仓合约 6/9/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." The AI rebound rolls on as investors stay bullish on tech. OpenAI confidentially files for an IPO, SpaceX readies its blockbuster debut, and Apple faces doubts over its AI push. Plus, some optimism in the housing market as existing home sales accelerate, Emily Graffeo  joins Open Interest on Apollo and Blackstone’s $35 billion AI financing deal, and Firefly Aerospace CEO Jason Kim on the space economy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Joins Race for Public Market Cash
title_cn: OpenAI 加入公开市场现金争夺战
summary: OpenAI has joined AI rivals with plans for a public listing later this year after the ChatGPT maker confidentially filed its S-1. This comes as the AI IPO pipeline has now reached some $3.6 trillion. However, according to PitchBook research, OpenAI may end up being the most expensive bet. Harrison Rolfes, senior analyst for PitchBook's private company coverage, joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Taiwan Eyes China AI Chip Sales Curbs; OpenAI Files for IPO | Bloomberg Tech 6/09/2026
title_cn: 台湾关注中国人工智能芯片销售限制； OpenAI 申请 IPO |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 9 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde discusses why Taiwan is weighing some of its toughest restrictions yet on AI chip sales to China, and OpenAI joining its AI rivals with plans for a potential public listing later this year. Plus, Apple lays the foundation for the AI era and hints at the company's upcoming foldable iPhone. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Looking to LatAm Market with MGUSD: MoneyGram CEO
title_cn: MoneyGram 首席执行官：通过 MGUSD 展望拉美市场
summary:
Anthony Soohoo, CEO of MoneyGram, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss the launch of MoneyGram's own stablecoin MGUSD and MoneyGram's ambition for global adoption.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Treasuries Shed $62B in Deepening Crypto Rout
title_cn: 加密货币溃败加剧，比特币国债损失 62B 美元
summary: Bloomberg's Monique Mulima joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Bitcoin’s slide this week is adding fresh pressure to one of the most ambitious financial experiments to emerge from the recent crypto boom: publicly traded companies created to accumulate digital assets on behalf of investors. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tencent Raises $4.7 Billion in Global Rush of AI Funding
title_cn: 腾讯在全球 AI 融资热潮中筹集 47 亿美元
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. raised nearly $4.7 billion from the sale of long-dated dollar and yuan bonds, marking the Chinese technology and gaming giant’s largest debt offering since 2020 as companies worldwide tap capital markets to fund artificial-intelligence investments.

title: Need Banking Lobby to Back Down: Gupta
title_cn: 需要银行游说团体做出让步：古普塔
summary: Kavita Gupta, Founder of Delta Blockchain Fund, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discussed the Clarity Act battle on Capital Hill. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IBM CEO Krishna on Quantum Advantage, Profit Strategy
title_cn: IBM 首席执行官 Krishna 谈量子优势和利润战略
summary: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna says he's excited about the potential uses for quantum computing. Speaking with Romaine Bostick at the Mizuho Technology Conference in New York, Krishna also comments on the Trump administration's investment in the company, the utilization of AI and IBM's profit strategy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Leads AI Innovation with Vertical Integration Amid Supply Chain Concerns
title_cn: 美国在供应链担忧中通过垂直整合引领人工智能创新
summary: Lei Qiu, head of thematic equities at Allianz Bernstein, discusses the evolving landscape of AI investment and innovation, emphasizing the United States' competitive edge in AI technology and infrastructure. Despite geopolitical tensions, particularly between the US and China, the US maintains a strong position due to its leading tech companies' strategic investments and rapid innovation in AI architecture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NASA Selects Crew for Artemis Mission to Test Moon Landers
title_cn: 美国宇航局选择宇航员执行阿耳忒弥斯任务以测试月球着陆器
summary: NASA announced the four astronauts who will fly to space as soon as next year to test out moon landers built by SpaceX and Blue Origin — the next stage in the agency’s ambitious Artemis program to ultimately send humans back to the lunar surface.

title: Firefly CEO Sees Moon Mission Boom
title_cn: 萤火虫首席执行官看到月球任务蓬勃发展
summary: Firefly Aerospace CEO Jason Kim joins Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about why the space economy is entering a major growth phase, powered by NASA’s moon-base ambitions, rising national security demand, and the need for reliable rocket access. He says Firefly’s edge is its full-stack approach: launch vehicles, lunar landers, orbiters, satellites, and AI software. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo, Blackstone Fund AI Boom
title_cn: Apollo、黑石基金 AI 繁荣
summary: Apollo and Blackstone are teaming up on a massive $35 billion AI financing deal that could reshape how artificial intelligence infrastructure gets funded. Bloomberg’s Emily Graffeo joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why Wall Street is creating new financing models for expensive AI chips, how Anthropic and Broadcom fit into the deal, and why this could be the beginning of an entirely new AI investment category. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple WWDC 2026 Recap: What’s Coming to iPhone, Mac and Other Devices
title_cn: Apple WWDC 2026 回顾：iPhone、Mac 和其他设备的最新动态
summary: Apple Inc. unveiled a new artificial intelligence strategy on Monday at its annual Worldwide Developers Conference, aiming to provide practical improvements and features that the company believes everyday consumers will actually use.

title: Meta Ordered by EU to Halt WhatsApp Curbs on AI Rivals
title_cn: 欧盟命令 Meta 停止对人工智能竞争对手 WhatsApp 的限制
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has been ordered by the European Union to temporarily halt policies that allegedly block rival AI firms from operating on its WhatsApp messaging service for businesses.

title: OpenAI Confidentially Files for IPO as Tech Rivals Compete for Cash
title_cn: OpenAI 秘密申请 IPO，技术竞争对手争夺现金
summary: OpenAI filed confidentially for an IPO, as the race heads to Wall Street. Tom Mackenzie breaks down why 2026 is turning into the year of megacap tech listings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Selloff a ‘Wake-Up Call’ for Investors, Wells Fargo Says
title_cn: 富国银行表示，人工智能抛售给投资者敲响了“警钟”
summary: Friday’s technology-driven selloff was a “wake-up call” for investors, according to Wells Fargo & Co., which said it has highlighted the risks of piling into the artificial-intelligence trade.

title: US Launches Strikes Against Iran After Helicopter Is Downed
title_cn: 直升机被击落后美国对伊朗发动空袭
summary: Meghan Hughes, a Democratic strategist, and Katie Frost, a Republican strategist, discuss the latest US strikes against Iran after an American military helicopter was shot down off Oman. They speaks on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ret. Rear Adm. Urges Trump to Keep Iran Response ‘Proportionate’
title_cn: 退休。少将敦促特朗普对伊朗的反应保持“相称”
summary: Retired Rear Admiral Mark Montgomery, Senior Fellow at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies and Former Destroyer Squadron Commander in the US Navy, says any US response after President Trump said Iran shot down an American Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz should target military sites tied to the attack and avoid economic targets that could escalate the conflict. His comments were made minutes before CENTCOM announced it had began 'self-defense' strikes against Iran. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Forces Strike Iran After American Helicopter Is Downed
title_cn: 美国直升机被击落后，美军袭击伊朗
summary: American forces carried out “self-defense strikes” against Iran on Tuesday, hours after President Donald Trump blamed Tehran for shooting down an American military helicopter off Oman.

title: Sports Belong on Free Channels, Broadcast Group Will Testify
title_cn: 体育属于免费频道，广播集团将作证
summary: Sports games ought to be primarily shown on free, over-the-air TV channels rather than on subscription-based streaming platforms, the head of the National Association of Broadcasters plans to tell members of Congress in a hearing about the rising costs to consumers.

title: H-1B Visa Rules Have Changed Again. What to Know
title_cn: H-1B 签证规则再次发生变化。要知道什么
summary: In addition to ramping up immigration enforcement and deportations in his second term, US President Donald Trump has taken steps to overhaul the H-1B visa program. Trump argues that the H-1B, a cornerstone of the employment-based immigration system that allows US companies to hire college-educated foreigners for specialized occupations, has been exploited to displace American workers.

title: US Launches Strikes Against Iran After Helicopter Shot Down
title_cn: 直升机被击落后美国对伊朗发动打击
summary: The US military launched fresh airstrikes against Iran hours after President Donald Trump vowed to retaliate for the shooting down of a US Army helicopter.

title: Trump Prevails on Spending Package, Averting Bar on Payouts
title_cn: 特朗普在支出计划上获胜，避免了支出障碍
summary: President Donald Trump prevailed after dissident Republican lawmakers abandoned an effort to leverage a $70 billion spending package to prevent him from reviving a payout fund for political allies who say they were unfairly targeted by the Biden administration.

title: Platner Is Not Democrats' Only Option in Maine
title_cn: 普拉特纳不是民主党在缅因州的唯一选择
summary: This election law could allow Democrats to replace Senate candidate Graham Platner, but it’s risky, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Ronald Brownstein. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Industries, Labor Market Grapple With AI Future | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/9/2026
title_cn: 行业、劳动力市场应对人工智能的未来|彭博商业周刊日报 6/9/2026
summary: Today, Mark Gurman, breaks down Apple's artificial intelligence revamp and what it tells customers and investors about future moves from the tech giant. Then, Olaolu Aganga, head of portfolio construction and analytics at Citi Wealth, discusses market volatility as chip stocks sell off amid developments in Iran. Plus, Jeff DiLullo, CEO at Philips North America, discusses how Philip's new report on how AI is changing the health care space. Finally, former commerce secretary and 75th governor of Rhode Island Gina Raimondo talks building up AI infrastructure in the US and how to keep changing technology from negatively impacting workers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary’s Magyar Unveils Legislation to Access EU Funds
title_cn: 匈牙利马扎尔公布获得欧盟资金的立法
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s administration has filed legislation to unlock funds the European Union had blocked over concerns about corruption and rule of law under former leader Viktor Orban.

title: Key Primary Races Will Provide Hints on Midterms Outcome
title_cn: 关键的初选将为中期选举结果提供线索
summary: Control of Congress is at stake.

title: Thune Urges Trump to Name Permanent Spy Chief to Replace Pulte
title_cn: 图恩敦促特朗普任命永久间谍负责人来取代普尔特
summary: Senate Republican Leader John Thune urged President Donald Trump to nominate a permanent national intelligence director to expedite congressional renewal of US spy agencies’ broad electronic surveillance authority.

title: UK Treasury Resists Defense Spending Push in 11th-Hour Talks
title_cn: 英国财政部在第 11 小时的会谈中抵制国防开支推动
summary: The UK Treasury continues to resist a push to speed up an increase in defense spending, just days out from unveiling the country’s long-delayed military investment plan.

title: Trump Blames Iran for Helicopter Hit | Balance of Power 6/9/2026
title_cn: 特朗普将直升机袭击归咎于伊朗权力平衡 6/9/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the Trump Administration. On today's show, IBM CEO Arvind Krishna, former Acting White House Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis and Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Operations in Nigeria Killed Hundreds of IS-Linked Militants
title_cn: 美国在尼日利亚的行动杀死了数百名与伊斯兰国有关的武装分子
summary: The US said it has killed about 200 Islamic State-linked fighters in Nigeria since operations began in the West African nation.

title: Trump Says US Must Respond to Iran’s Attack on Helicopter
title_cn: 特朗普称美国必须对伊朗直升机袭击做出回应
summary: President Donald Trump said, “the United States must, of necessity, respond” against Iran for shooting down a US military helicopter. Trump made the announcement in a social media post on Tuesday afternoon. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Surface Naval Drone Rescued Downed US Apache Crew, Pentagon Says
title_cn: 五角大楼表示，水面海军无人机救出了被击落的美国阿帕奇机组人员
summary: A surface naval drone helped rescue two downed crew members from a US Army AH-64 Apache that crashed off the coast of Oman, according to US Central Command, the first time an unmanned vehicle was used in such an operation.

title: Peru’s Diaspora Emerges as Tie-Breaker in Razor-Edge Presidential Race
title_cn: 秘鲁侨民成为刀锋总统竞选中的决胜者
summary: Peru’s presidential election is so tight that it’ll likely be citizens abroad, rather than those from within the country, who will break the tie.

title: Michigan, Canada Plan Opening of Bridge Trump Threatened to Block
title_cn: 密歇根州和加拿大计划开通大桥 特朗普威胁要阻止
summary: Officials in the US and Canada are planning a ribbon-cutting ceremony in the coming days for a new C$6.4 billion ($4.6 billion) bridge linking Michigan to the province of Ontario, which President Donald Trump threatened to block earlier this year.

title: GOP Lawmakers Raise Doubts on Prospects of Third Budget Bill
title_cn: 共和党议员对第三次预算法案的前景提出质疑
summary: Some key Republicans in Congress are throwing cold water on prospects for passing a third party-line budget bill, even as House GOP leaders insist they can move another mammoth legislative package this summer.

title: Graham Platner’s Scandals Risk Spoiling Democrats’ Maine Bet
title_cn: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳的丑闻可能会破坏民主党在缅因州的赌注
summary: Graham Platner heads into Maine’s Democratic Senate primary on Tuesday facing a fresh bout of controversy, turning what had looked like a coronation into a test of whether he’s a viable candidate for the party’s push to secure a majority in this year’s midterms.

title: San Francisco’s ‘Overpaid CEO’ Tax Quashed with Billionaire Help
title_cn: 旧金山“薪酬过高的首席执行官”税在亿万富翁的帮助下被取消
summary: San Francisco voters rejected a union-backed ballot measure to raise taxes on large corporations doing business in the city, a win for billionaires who argued that the levy would harm the city’s economic recovery.

title: Kenyan Police Clash With Protesters Over US Ebola Facility
title_cn: 肯尼亚警方因美国埃博拉设施与抗议者发生冲突
summary: Kenyan police fired teargas at protesters demonstrating against a planned quarantine facility for US servicemen and citizens exposed to the Ebola virus.

title: UK’s Starmer to Announce Under-16s Social Media Ban in Days
title_cn: 英国 Starmer 几天内宣布禁止 16 岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is preparing to announce a ban on under-16s using social media within days after his position hardened following parents’ response to a government consultation.

title: Roblox Shares Rise on Report Russia May Unblock Gaming Platform
title_cn: Roblox 股价因俄罗斯可能解除封锁游戏平台而上涨
summary: Roblox Corp. shares jumped after a report Russian government agencies proposed lifting restrictions on the company’s gaming platform, though any final decision rests with law enforcement authorities.

title: Trump Will Ask Supreme Court to Revive $475 Million CNN Suit
title_cn: 特朗普将要求最高法院恢复 CNN 价值 4.75 亿美元的诉讼
summary: President Donald Trump told the US Supreme Court he intends to ask the justices to revive his $475 million defamation lawsuit against CNN over use of the term “Big Lie” in reporting on his claim that the 2020 election was rigged against him.

title: How a Meme Becomes a Political Movement
title_cn: 模因如何成为一场政治运动
summary: From shrinking returns on education to the fading hopes of a middle-class life, India’s youth have many reasons to feel wounded. One insult from from the chief justice of India may have been the last straw, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Andy Mukherjee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon Accuses Alibaba, Baidu of Aiding China’s Military
title_cn: 五角大楼指责阿里巴巴、百度援助中国军方
summary: The Pentagon accused some of China’s biggest companies, including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd., Baidu Inc. and BYD Co. of supporting the Chinese military, doubling down on an earlier decision to label crown jewels of the country’s corporate world as threats to US national security.
